# Sources And Ingestion

Define sources, discover live systems, map source intent, and move data into landing and bronze zones.

## kiri discover

Scaffold a Kirimana project from a live...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri discover [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--target` | Source platform. Closed menu: ['duckdb', 'sqlserver', 'databricks', 'snowflake', 'postgres']. | no | duckdb |  |
| `--conn` | Connection string. May include ${vault:<id>:<key>} tokens. For --target duckdb this is the database path or ``:memory:``. | no | :memory: |  |
| `--output`, `-o` | Directory to write the scaffold + report into. | no | scaffold |  |
| `--schemas` | Comma-separated list of schemas to scan. Default: every schema. | no |  |  |
| `--max-tables` | Stop after scanning this many tables. Useful for a smoke run. | no |  |  |
| `--known-source` | Pin a known source. Format: 'name:schema.glob' (e.g. 'erp:dbo.*'). Repeatable. Pinned members override the FK-derived grouping. | no |  |  |
| `--with-ai`, `--no-ai` | Enable AI-augmented descriptions + classification. Requires --max-cost. | no | False |  |
| `--max-cost` | Hard cap on AI spend (USD). Required when --with-ai is set. Scan halts when the cap would be breached; partial scaffold is preserved. | no |  |  |
| `--force-ai-for-all`, `--ai-for-low-confidence` | When set, invoke AI for every table regardless of heuristic confidence. Default: only invoke when the heuristic pass is below threshold. | no | False |  |
| `--probe-sample-data` | Fetch this many sample rows (PII-suspect columns EXCLUDED) and forward to the AI provider. Requires --with-ai AND --confirm-data-egress. Defaults to 0 (metadata-only, no row egress). | no | 0 |  |
| `--confirm-data-egress`, `--no-confirm-data-egress` | Required gate when --probe-sample-data > 0. Acknowledges that sample rows will leave your perimeter. | no | False |  |
| `--yes`, `-y` | Skip the interactive pre-scan cost confirmation. | no | False |  |
| `--layout` | Output layout - closed menu: legacy \| layer. `legacy` emits per-table `contracts/<schema>/<table>.yml` (the historical shape). `layer` emits per-(domain, layer) `01-config/<domain>/<layer>.yml` by running the legacy emitter first then `migrate-from-contracts`. | no | legacy |  |
| `--domain` | Domain name for `--layout layer`. Required when layout=layer; becomes the parent directory under `01-config/`. | no |  |  |

## kiri fetch

Pull from REST endpoints or databases into...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri fetch [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--target`, `-t` | Named profile to use (dev\|test\|prod). Falls back to KIRIMANA_TARGET or the project's default_target. | no |  |  |
| `--source` | Only fetch this source (default: all rest_api sources) | no |  |  |
| `--table` | Only fetch this table (within the chosen source) | no |  |  |

Scan landing zones, convert incoming files...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri ingest bronze [OPTIONS]
```

| `--target`, `-t` | Named profile to use (dev\|test\|prod). Falls back to KIRIMANA_TARGET or the project's default_target. | no |  |  |

### kiri ingest discover

Probe an Airbyte connector's source-schema...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri ingest discover [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri ingest discover list-definitions`](#kiri-ingest-discover-list-definitions) - Print the source-definitions the Airbyte...
- [`kiri ingest discover schema`](#kiri-ingest-discover-schema) - Run discover_schema and print the returned...

#### kiri ingest discover list-definitions

Print the source-definitions the Airbyte...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri ingest discover list-definitions [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--endpoint`, `-e` | Airbyte REST endpoint base URL (e.g. http://localhost:8000/api/v1). Defaults to AIRBYTE_ENDPOINT env var, or http://localhost:8000/api/v1. | no |  |  |
| `--client-id` | OAuth2 client id. Defaults to AIRBYTE_CLIENT_ID env var. Pair with --client-secret. | no |  |  |
| `--client-secret` | OAuth2 client secret. Defaults to AIRBYTE_CLIENT_SECRET env var. Pair with --client-id. | no |  |  |
| `--token` | Pre-exchanged bearer token. Alternative to OAuth2. Defaults to AIRBYTE_TOKEN env var. | no |  |  |
| `--workspace-id` | Scope requests to a specific Airbyte workspace id. | no |  |  |
| `--match` | Case-insensitive substring filter on the connector name (e.g. 'salesforce'). Omit to list everything. | no |  |  |

#### kiri ingest discover schema

Run discover_schema and print the returned...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri ingest discover schema [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--source-definition-id` | UUID of the Airbyte source definition to probe. Find with [bold]kiri ingest discover list-definitions[/bold]. | yes |  |  |
| `--config-file` | Path to a JSON file with the connector's connection configuration. Treated as secret - pass the path, not the contents inline. | yes |  |  |
| `--endpoint`, `-e` | Airbyte REST endpoint base URL (e.g. http://localhost:8000/api/v1). Defaults to AIRBYTE_ENDPOINT env var, or http://localhost:8000/api/v1. | no |  |  |
| `--client-id` | OAuth2 client id. Defaults to AIRBYTE_CLIENT_ID env var. Pair with --client-secret. | no |  |  |
| `--client-secret` | OAuth2 client secret. Defaults to AIRBYTE_CLIENT_SECRET env var. Pair with --client-id. | no |  |  |
| `--token` | Pre-exchanged bearer token. Alternative to OAuth2. Defaults to AIRBYTE_TOKEN env var. | no |  |  |
| `--workspace-id` | Scope requests to a specific Airbyte workspace id. | no |  |  |
| `--stream` | Print only this stream's columns (name + Kirimana type). Omit to list every stream. | no |  |  |
| `--against-contract` | Compare each discovered stream's columns to a Kirimana contract's declared columns and print a drift report. Pass the contract name (e.g. 'silver_customer'); the project is loaded from --project-dir or CWD. | no |  |  |
| `--project-dir` | Project directory used to resolve --against-contract. | no |  |  |

### kiri ingest modes

List supported ingestion modes (read-only...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri ingest modes [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--include-planned`, `--no-planned` | Include planned/aspirational modes (dlt, debezium, stream) with the canonical ones. | no | True |  |
| `--format` | json \| text | no | text |  |

### Examples

```bash
kiri source scaffold` accepts.
```

### kiri ingest new-source

Author a new source via an AI-assisted,...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri ingest new-source [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--interactive`, `--no-interactive` | Run the AI-assisted onboarding flow. Default: true. | no | True |  |
| `--backend` | Skip the chooser and route straight to the named backend's setup flow. Omit to let the AI ask which engine to use (recommended for new users). | no |  | `airbyte`, `native`, `dlt`, `debezium`, `landing_zone` |
| `--yes`, `-y` | Skip the save-confirmation prompt (CI / tests). | no | False |  |

### kiri ingest sync

Trigger the chosen ingest backend for all...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri ingest sync [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--target`, `-t` | Named profile to use (dev\|test\|prod). Falls back to KIRIMANA_TARGET or the project's default_target. | no |  |  |
| `--backend` | Ingest engine to drive. Must be named explicitly - Kirimana never silently defaults. Only 'airbyte' is wired today; 'native' runs through kiri apply; 'dlt' and 'debezium' are roadmap. | yes |  | `airbyte`, `native`, `dlt`, `debezium`, `landing_zone` |
| `--source` | Only sync this source. | no |  |  |
| `--table` | Only sync this table. Requires --source. | no |  |  |
| `--dry-run`, `--no-dry-run` | Print the plan without calling the backend. Default: false. | no | False |  |

### kiri source commit

Atomic source-YAML commit (mirror of...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri source commit [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--target` | Path to the source YAML file to write (e.g. sources/crm.yml) | yes |  |  |
| `--content` | Path to a file containing the new YAML content | yes |  |  |
| `--checksum` | SHA-256 hex of the source YAML the caller loaded; commit refuses if the on-disk hash differs (optimistic lock). Skip to disable conflict detection. | no |  |  |

### kiri source group

Recommend contract groupings for a...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri source group [OPTIONS] SOURCE_NAME
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `SOURCE_NAME` | Source name | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--urns` | Comma-separated source-table URNs, e.g. urn:kirimana:source:salesforce:accounts,urn:kirimana:source:salesforce:contacts | yes |  |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--intent` | Optional operator/Kiri intent string passed through to the response | no |  |  |
| `--ai-augmented`, `--no-ai` | Rephrase each multi-table group's reason via AIGateway. Decision and signals stay deterministic; only the reason prose is AI-touched. | no | False |  |

### kiri source introspect

Sample a reachable source and emit an...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri source introspect [OPTIONS] NAME TABLE
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `NAME` | Source name (also the draft file stem) | yes |  |  |
| `TABLE` | Table name to populate from the sampled source | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--owner` | Source owner email or group | yes |  |  |
| `--domain` | Business domain (snake_case) | yes |  |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--mode` | rest_api \| database | no | rest_api |  |
| `--classification` | public \| internal \| confidential \| restricted | no | internal |  |
| `--url` | REST API endpoint URL | no |  |  |
| `--method` | REST method: GET \| POST | no | GET |  |
| `--header` | REST header as KEY=VALUE; vault refs are resolved | no |  |  |
| `--query-param` | REST query param as KEY=VALUE; vault refs are resolved | no |  |  |
| `--timeout-seconds` | REST sample timeout | no | 30.0 |  |
| `--auth-kind` | none \| bearer \| header \| basic | no | none |  |
| `--auth-header-name` | Header name for --auth-kind header | no |  |  |
| `--auth-value-ref` | Vault ref for bearer/header auth value | no |  |  |
| `--auth-username-ref` | Vault ref for basic auth username | no |  |  |
| `--auth-password-ref` | Vault ref for basic auth password | no |  |  |
| `--db-kind` | postgres \| mysql \| mssql \| oracle \| sqlite | no | sqlite |  |
| `--db-host` | Database host; for sqlite, the file path | no |  |  |
| `--db-port` | Database port | no | 1 |  |
| `--db-name` | Database name; for sqlite, use any non-empty value | no | main |  |
| `--db-schema` | Database schema | no |  |  |
| `--db-username-ref` | Vault ref for database username | no |  |  |
| `--db-password-ref` | Vault ref for database password | no |  |  |
| `--output`, `-o` | Draft YAML path; defaults to stdout | no |  |  |
| `--write` | Write the draft to --output instead of stdout | no | False |  |
| `--overwrite` | Replace an existing draft path | no | False |  |
| `--ai`, `--no-ai` | Apply audited AI annotations to sampled schema | no | False |  |

### kiri source patch

Propose (or apply) a closed-menu patch on...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri source patch [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--op` | Patch op: set_source_owner \| set_source_classification \| set_source_domain \| set_source_description \| add_table \| remove_table \| add_table_column \| remove_table_column \| set_column_pii \| set_column_classification \| set_table_ingestion \| clear_table_ingestion | yes |  |  |
| `--args` | JSON-encoded args dict for the op | no | {} |  |
| `--target` | Path to the source YAML file to patch | no | sources/source.yml |  |
| `--source` | Source name within the file to target (when the file declares multiple sources). Defaults to the first. | no |  |  |
| `--apply` | Write the patched YAML to disk after validation succeeds | no | False |  |

### kiri source scaffold

Render ``sources/<name>.yml`` from a...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri source scaffold [OPTIONS] NAME
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `NAME` | Source name (also the file stem) | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--owner` | Source owner email or group | yes |  |  |
| `--domain` | Business domain (snake_case) | yes |  |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--classification` | public \| internal \| confidential \| restricted | no | internal |  |
| `--mode` | Ingestion mode (canonical or alias - see `kiri ingest modes`). Defaults to fixture_file for the local-demo path. | no | fixture_file |  |
| `--description` | One-line description of the source | no |  |  |
| `--tables` | Comma-separated table names; columns are added later via the editor or AI flow. Example: --tables customers,orders | no |  |  |
| `--overwrite` | Replace an existing sources/<name>.yml | no | False |  |

### kiri source tables

List one source's tables with server-side...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri source tables [OPTIONS] SOURCE_NAME
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `SOURCE_NAME` | Source name (from sources/*.yml) | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--query`, `-q` | Free-text search across table name + physical name + columns | no |  |  |
| `--filter` | all \| ungoverned \| governed \| pii \| vault | no | all |  |
| `--limit` | Page size (1..500) | no | 50 |  |
| `--cursor` | Opaque cursor from a prior page's `next_cursor` | no |  |  |
